parameters.query:
SELECT
  nf.id, nf.title, nf.severity, nf.category, nf.cwe_id, nf.owasp_category,
  nf.validation_status, nf.is_recurring, nf.recurrence_count, nf.occurrence_count,
  nf.first_seen,
  a.business_criticality, a.scope_status, a.environment, a.auth_required, a.asset_type,
  e.rate_limit_profile,
  c.industry
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
WHERE nf.id = '{{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).finding_id }}'

UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  recon_score = {{ $json.recon_score }},
  priority_bucket = '{{ $json.priority_bucket }}',
  score_explanation = '{{ $json.score_explanation.replace(/'/g,"''") }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}';
INSERT INTO risk_score_history (finding_id, recon_score, priority_bucket, score_breakdown)
VALUES ('{{ $json.finding_id }}', {{ $json.recon_score }}, '{{ $json.priority_bucket }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.score_breakdown).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb);

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🚨 *RECON OS — IMMEDIATE ATTENTION*
Finding: ' + $('Compute RECON Score').first().json.finding_id + '
Score: ' + $('Compute RECON Score').first().json.recon_score + '/10
' + $('Compute RECON Score').first().json.score_explanation, username: 'RECON OS Alerts', icon_emoji: ':rotating_light:' }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-11: Risk Scorer — multi-dimensional RECON score (0–10) using severity, confidence, exposure, criticality, recurrence, breadth. Alerts on immediate_attention findings. Not CVSS-only.
